home.homeEmptyDescription: Your home screen is empty. Add modules from the discover section to customize your experience.

discover.title: Everything Hub
discover.subtitle: Discover your next daily essential.
discover.comingSoonSubtitle: These are coming soon, stay tuned!

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your account and data
account.deleteDescription: Your account, profile, preferences, and all data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteModalMessage: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?
account.deleteModalError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
account.deleteModalReauth: You need to sign in again to delete your account. Please sign out and sign back in.
account.onboardingDescription: Restart the introduction and initial setup wizard.

stopScroll.title: Stop Scrolling, Start Living
stopScroll.subtitle: Instead of endless scrolling on social media, try something new and delightful today!
staticActivities: Go outside and take a brisk 15-minute walk.
Call a friend you haven't talked to in a while.
Open your favorite song and just listen to it (without doing anything else).
Meditate for 10 minutes or just close your eyes and rest.
Try a new drink/coffee recipe with ingredients at home.

hobbyCenter.title: Hobby Center
hobbyCenter.subtitle: Discover personal interests, follow beginner roadmaps, and save your progress.
hobbyCenter.notesPlaceholder: Add your beginner experiences, reminders, or goals here...
hobbyCenter.noTrackedHobbies: You are not tracking any hobbies yet. Choose a hobby and set its status to start tracking!

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Connect with others and play together
friends.noFriends: You don't have any friends yet. Use the search icon in the top right to search and add friends!
friends.removeFriendConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {username} from your friends list?
friends.inviteError: Could not send friend request. Please try again.
friends.shareIdDescription: Share your ID with friends so they can add you.
friends.searchDescription: Type the exact and complete username of the person you want to add.

subcenter.subtitle: Global Billing Hub
subcenter.websiteHelp: 💡 Enter the website address to automatically fetch the logo.
subcenter.voidReceiptDescription: This record will be permanently removed from your subscription list.
subcenter.emptyDescription: Add Netflix, Spotify, and your other memberships to track monthly spending and renewal dates in one place.

suggest.name: Suggest
suggest.description: Recommend movies, series, games, or venues to your friends and track their status!

neyapsam.name: What to Do?
neyapsam.description: Quickly create activity invitations or polls, and invite your friends.

one-day-city-guide.name: One Day City Guide
one-day-city-guide.description: What to do in a selected city in one day? Best routes and recommendations.

workplaces.name: Workplaces
workplaces.description: Discover libraries and cafes suitable for working, and suggest new ones.

digital-menu.name: Digital Menu
digital-menu.description: View QR menus of cafes, plan your order, and call a waiter from your table.

stamp-card.name: Regulars' Card
stamp-card.description: Collect stamps from partnered businesses and win free gifts.

concert-list.name: My Concert List
concert-list.description: Track the concerts you attend with dates and personal notes.

budget.name: Budget
budget.description: Individual and shared budget tracking, split expenses easily with friends.

tasarruf-challenges.name: Savings
tasarruf-challenges.description: Follow saving challenges, reduce your expenses, and achieve goals.

subcenter.name: Subcenter
subcenter.description: Track all your subscriptions and bill payments in one place.

memedex.name: Memedex

series-track.name: SeriesTrack
series-track.description: Track the series you watch, mark episodes, and monitor your progress.

read-tracker.name: Oku Oku
read-tracker.description: Build a reading habit, list your books, and set weekly reading goals.

game-companion.name: Scorekeeper

chocolate-db.name: ChocolateDB
chocolate-db.description: The IMDb of chocolates! Find, rate, and review your favorite chocolate.

itu-yemekhane.name: Campus Meals
itu-yemekhane.description: Track the daily menu and receive notifications.

campus-events.name: Events

campus-concerts.name: Campus Concerts

gym.name: Gym

buyuk-maclar.name: Big Matches

meal-planner.name: Meal Planner

surdurulebilirlik.name: We're Sustainable
